etymology.description: Depicts a bent-over figure with long hair -> an old man
etymology.interpretation: ⺹ (lǎo, "old") is a pictogram representing an old man with long hair, indicating age and experience, which is also integrated into complex characters like 老 (lǎo, "old") and 孝 (xiào, "filial piety") to convey aspects related to elders.
